title: Delicate Dutch Chicken Flatbread
description: A savory, fluffy flatbread with tender braised chicken, perfect for a light lunch.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine flour, yeast, salt, and pepper, mixing until evenly distributed.
Create a well in the center and add warm milk, egg, and olive oil, then stir until a rough dough forms.
Knead the dough on a floured surface for 6 minutes until smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover, and let rise in a warm place for 45 minutes until doubled.
While the dough rises, heat a skillet over medium-high heat, add a splash of oil, and sear the diced chicken until cooked through; set aside.
Once the dough has risen, punch it down and roll it out into a 12-inch circle, then transfer it to a baking sheet lined with parchment.
Brush the dough with a little olive oil, then scatter the seared chicken, onion, and garlic evenly over the surface.
Bake the flatbread at 200°C (400°F) for 12 minutes until golden and the chicken is heated through.
Remove from oven, let cool 5 minutes, then slice into wedges.
Serve warm with a side of fresh salad or yogurt dip.
